author: August
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Shows file metadata, text statistics, and document outline in the sidebar.

manifest.author: aicayzer
manifest.description: Shows file metadata, text statistics, and document outline in the sidebar.
manifest.name: File Metadata

name: File Metadata

releases.author: aicayzer
releases.description:
## What's New

### Collapsible sections
Click any section header (File, Statistics, Outline) to collapse or expand it. The state is remembered for the session.

### Reading time & readability
- **Reading time** — estimated based on word count and configurable WPM (default 200)
- **Readability score** — Flesch reading ease (0–100) with a plain-language label (opt-in)

### Link & code block counts (opt-in)
- Internal links ([[wikilinks]])
- External links (markdown URLs)
- Fenced code blocks

### Date format setting
Choose between **Short** (5 Mar 2026, 14:30), **Long** (Wed, 5 March 2026, 14:30), or **Relative** (3h ago).

### Right-click context menu
Right-click any row for "Copy value" or "Copy Label: Value".

### Style Settings integration
If you have the [Style Settings](https://github.com/mgmeyers/obsidian-style-settings) plugin installed, File Metadata now exposes customisable colours, divider opacity, section spacing, and label column width. Without Style Settings, the plugin looks identical to before.

## Files changed
- `styles.css` — Style Settings `@settings` block, CSS custom properties
- `src/stats.ts` — reading time, readability, link/code block counters
- `src/settings.ts` — 6 new settings with UI controls
- `src/FileMetadataView.ts` — collapsible sections, context menus, new stats
- `src/main.ts` — collapsed state storage
- `README.md` — updated settings documentation
